{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Foreign Intent
| introduced = Of Killers and Kings
}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Foreign Intent]] is a power or [[Awakened object]] used to seal buildings.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
